function.name: get_current_weather
function.description: Get the current weather for a city.
function.long_description: Retrieves real-time weather conditions such as temperature, humidity, wind speed, and weather description for a specified city using an external weather API.

city.description: Name of the city to get current weather information for

example_user_queries: What is the current weather in Bengaluru?
Show me the weather right now in New York.
Get the current temperature and conditions for London.
What is the weather like in Tokyo at the moment?
Tell me the current weather in Toronto.
Show live weather conditions in Sydney.
Get the weather now for Singapore.
What are the current conditions in San Francisco?
Check current weather using city Mumbai.
